metadata.title: States PCS: Bihar GK for BPSC and other Bihar PCS Exams

questions.question: Which State has started SMS and MASK initiative?
questions.explanation: Bihar has started this initiative. S- Soap/Sanitizer M- Mask S- Social Distancing MASK -Mera Aapka Suraksha Kavach

questions.question: Who has been appointed chairman of Bihar Road Safety Committee ?
questions.explanation: Justice A M Sapre was appointed chairman of Bihar Road Safety Committee.

questions.question: In which district of Bihar, Agnoor Hydroelectric Project is located?
questions.explanation: Agnoor Hydroelectric Project is located in Arwal district of Bihar. It was commissioned during the year 2004-05.

questions.question: Shirkhinda Hydroelectric Project is located in which district of Bihar?
questions.explanation: Shirkhinda Hydroelectric Project is located in Rohtas district of Bihar. It was commissioned during the year 2009-10.

questions.question: Sohar is a traditional folk song of Bihar. With which social event is Sohar music predominantly associated?
questions.explanation: Sohar folk songs of Bihar are sung by women during the birth of a child, especially in the Magadhi language, to celebrate and bless the newborn, reflecting tradition and social customs.

questions.question: In which month, Buddha Jayanti or Buddha Purnima is celebrated?
questions.explanation: Buddha Jayanti falls on a full moon day in the month of Vaisakh (which usually falls in April or May).

questions.question: Name the animal on the capital of Lauriya Nandangarh pillar?
questions.explanation: The famous pillar of Ashoka is a single block of polished sandstone over 32 feet (10 m) high. The top is bell shaped with a circular abacus ornamented with Brahmi geese supporting the statue of a lion.

questions.question: What is the rank of Bihar in recently released Land Records and Services Index 2021 (N-LRSI)?
questions.explanation: In the Land Records and Services Index, 2021 Bihar has been ranked at 8th position, with total score of 64.8. The Index is published by the National Council of Applied Economic Research, annually. It assesses the extent of digitization of land records as well as the quality of these records across the states and union territories of India.

questions.question: Bihar’s first automatic driving test track started at which district?
questions.explanation: State transport minister, Sheela Kumari, inaugurated the automated driving test track at Institute of Driving Training and Traffic Research (IDTR) in Aurangabad. The driving track is equipped with sensors and cameras, which are connected to the computer system in monitoring room at IDTR. When driving aspirant will cross or touch the marked line on tracks, cameras and sensors will dispatch signals to computers. It will also provide video footage of driving tests, based on which the aspirants will get their driving licenses.

questions.question: Who is the Deputy Secretary of Bihar Legislative Assembly?
questions.explanation: Anil Jaiswal is the current deputy secretary of Bihar Legislative Assembly
